3104670.name: Doppel Hunter
3104670.description:
Doppel Hunter is a party game for 2-6 players involving hiding amongst copies of yourself called "Doppels" and outsmarting other players. Break out the drinks and snacks as you compete with your friends in a hilarious game full of action, deception, and chaos.

How to play

  • Choose between various characters, each with their unique personalities

  • Familiarize yourself with your doppel-clone ability to hide and trick your opponents 

  • Spawn into a variety of different maps with the other players. Put on your "act-casual-hat" as you cleverly hide in plain sight amongst the doppels. The use of sneaky trickery is fully endorsed... win by any means necessary.

  • Every round, random new game modifiers are applied, making each round unique.

  • Customize the game details and create your own game modes

  • Encounter and unlock all the game modifiers

More Info

---Character Skins---

Many character skins can be unlocked by doing various tasks. Some are more obvious than others. Try to collect them all

---Game Modifiers---

There is an ever-expanding pool of "game modifiers" that have a chance to be applied to each round. There's a random chance for each modifier to be selected. Once you have encountered a modifier, it is "unlocked" and can be toggled in a custom game. There are plenty of secrets and easter eggs to discover.

---Tribute to the Doppels---

Meet your everyday average doppel. Please take a moment to sympathize with them. Just trying to mind their own business, brainlessly wandering indefinitely around the map. That's all they want to do, and players keep running around acting like they own the place. So underappreciated... Doppels, we thank you for your sacrifice.
3104670.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
